explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Obtain external validation of AI practices or require vendor certifications.

fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

governance.findings: The 2024 10-K Annual Report indicates a strategic investment in AI across operations, suggesting a deliberate policy for AI adoption. The 2025 annual report further indicates a strategic commitment to integrating AI across operations, including manufacturing, distribution, and sales, demonstrating a clear policy statement and strategic decision to invest in and implement AI technologies.
governance.path_to_improvement: Name an AI governance body with defined mandate covering all AI use.

relevant_sources.summary: The Keurig Dr Pepper 2024 10-K Annual Report provides evidence for the **governance** and **transparency** pillars of responsible AI. The report supports governance by indicating a strategic investment in AI across operations, suggesting a deliberate policy for AI adoption. Transparency is supported by the description of a simulation model and its inputs, which offers insight into the methodology used.
relevant_sources.title: Keurig Dr Pepper 2024 10-K Annual Report (SEC Filing)

relevant_sources.summary: The 2025 annual report from Keurig Dr Pepper indicates a strategic commitment to integrating AI across its operations, including manufacturing, distribution, and sales. This disclosure supports the **governance** pillar by demonstrating a clear policy statement and strategic decision to invest in and implement AI technologies.
relevant_sources.title: Form 10-K Annual Report 2025

oversight.findings: A blog post highlights the use of human oversight to protect data integrity when AI is used for consumer insights. This indicates an operational process for AI.
oversight.path_to_improvement: Publish override mechanisms, escalation processes, or appeal workflows.

relevant_sources.summary: This blog post from the Front End of Innovation (FEI) conference provides evidence for the **oversight** pillar of responsible AI. It highlights Keurig Dr Pepper's use of AI for consumer insights and mentions "human oversight" to protect data integrity, indicating an operational process for AI.
relevant_sources.title: Leveraging Consumer Insights and AI for Innovation

privacy.path_to_improvement: Document data protection practices for AI systems, including vendor AI data handling.

transparency.findings: The 2024 10-K Annual Report describes a simulation model and its inputs. This description offers insight into the methodology used for the model.
transparency.path_to_improvement: Document AI systems in use, including vendor/third-party AI tools.

relevant_sources.summary: The Keurig Dr Pepper 2024 10-K Annual Report provides evidence for the **governance** and **transparency** pillars of responsible AI. The report supports governance by indicating a strategic investment in AI across operations, suggesting a deliberate policy for AI adoption. Transparency is supported by the description of a simulation model and its inputs, which offers insight into the methodology used.
relevant_sources.title: Keurig Dr Pepper 2024 10-K Annual Report (SEC Filing)

summary.overall_findings: Governance and oversight are addressed in Keurig Dr Pepper's public disclosures, which cover two of the seven evaluated responsible AI pillars. Within governance, the 2024 10-K Annual Report indicates a strategic investment in AI across operations, suggesting a deliberate policy for AI adoption. Additionally, oversight materials reference human oversight to protect data integrity in AI used for consumer insights, indicating an operational process. No qualifying public evidence was found for the majority of the 7 evaluated pillars, based on a review of 13 publicly available sources.
